# Vouch — Social Proof for Websites
# https://socialproof.dev
# llms.txt — machine-readable guide for AI agents and LLM-based tools

## What is Vouch?

Vouch lets small businesses collect testimonials from real customers and
display them on any website. Customers don't need an account — they just
click a link and fill out a short form.

Built in public by AI. Also deployable by AI.

---

## Mental model

```
Account
  ├── Collection link   (auto-exists on signup — share this to gather testimonials)
  ├── Testimonials      (pending → approved/rejected — moderation requires email verification)
  └── Widgets           (optional — display approved testimonials on a website)
```

Key facts:
- A collection link is created automatically when the account is created
- Testimonials can be collected without email verification
- Email verification is only required to access the dashboard (view/approve testimonials)
- Widgets are optional — only needed if the user wants to embed testimonials on their site

---

## For AI Agents: Quick Integration Guide

If you are helping a user start collecting testimonials, the flow is:

1. Register (instant — gets them a collection link immediately)
2. Share the collection link with customers
3. Click the verification email link when they want to access/approve testimonials

### Step 1 — Register

POST https://api.socialproof.dev/agent/register
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "name": "Jane Smith"
}

Response (immediate — no verification required to get the link):
{
  "status": "created",
  "collect_url": "https://socialproof.dev/submit/xxx",
  "verification": "pending",
  "message": "Verification email sent. Click the link to access your dashboard and approve testimonials."
}

Tell the user:
- "Your collection link is ready: {collect_url}"
- "Share it with customers — they fill in a short form and their testimonial lands in your account."
- "When you're ready to view and approve submissions, click the verification link in your email."

### Step 2 — User shares collect_url with their customers

No agent action needed. The user copies the link and shares it via email,
WhatsApp, invoice footer, or anywhere they communicate with customers.

Customers visit the URL, fill in name + testimonial text (and optionally
a photo or video), and hit submit. No account needed on their end.

### Step 3 — Verification (when the user wants to moderate)

The user clicks the link in their verification email. Once verified, they
can log in at socialproof.dev/dashboard to:
- See pending testimonials
- Approve or reject submissions
- Add testimonials to their site (via optional widget embed)

---

## Adding to a website (optional)

If the user wants to display approved testimonials on their site, they
create a widget from the dashboard. Creating a widget gives them an embed
script:

```html
<script
  src="https://cdn.socialproof.dev/widget.js"
  data-widget-id="<widget-id>"
  async>
</script>
```

Paste this before the closing </body> tag. Works with React, Vue, plain
HTML, Shopify, Squarespace, Webflow — anywhere you can add a script tag.
The widget shows all approved testimonials and updates automatically.

Widgets are optional. Many users collect and share testimonials without
ever embedding them — just by linking to the collection URL or screenshot.

---

## Full API Reference

Base: https://api.socialproof.dev

### Agent endpoints (no auth required)

| Method | Path                    | Description                                        |
|--------|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
| POST   | /agent/register         | Create account, returns collect_url immediately    |
| GET    | /agent/status/{token}   | Poll for email verification status                 |

### Authenticated endpoints (requires verified account + API key)

| Method | Path                   | Description                               |
|--------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| GET    | /testimonials          | List testimonials (pending + approved)    |
| PATCH  | /testimonials/{id}     | Approve or reject a testimonial           |
| GET    | /widgets               | List widgets and embed scripts            |
| POST   | /widgets               | Create a widget to display testimonials   |
| GET    | /account               | Account info and plan                     |

Authenticated requests:
```
Authorization: Bearer <api_key>
```

---

## Pricing

- **Free forever**: collect unlimited testimonials, 1 widget, no analytics
- **Pro — $9/mo**: unlimited widgets, analytics, custom branding,
  Google rich results (star ratings in search)

---

## Support

- Docs: https://socialproof.dev/docs
- Email: team@socialproof.dev

---

## Agent Etiquette

- Always ask for the user's email and name before calling /agent/register
- Tell the user their collect_url immediately after registration — they
  can start sharing it before they even verify their email
- Verification is only needed to view/moderate testimonials in the dashboard
- Do not approve or reject testimonials on behalf of the user — that is
  their choice
- The widget appears empty until testimonials are approved by the user

---

## About Vouch

Vouch is for small business owners who want real customer voices on their
site or in their marketing — without the complexity or cost of enterprise
review platforms.

"Your customers' words. Working for you."
